name: Frodo Baggins
text: Has a [leadership] icon. Response: When Frodo Baggins would be dealt any amount of damage by an undefended attack, reduce that amount by 3. (Limit once per round.)

name: Samwise Gamgee
text: Has a [spirit] icon. Response: After Frodo Baggins exhausts, ready Samwise Gamgee.

name: Merry
text: Has a [tactics] icon. While Pippin is in play, Merry gets +1 [willpower]. When an enemy would trigger a Forced effect, cancel it. (Limit once per round.)

name: Merry
text: If Merry has the Ring-bearer trait, he gains a [tactics] icon. While Pippin is in play, Merry gets +1 [attack] and does not exhaust to quest. Action: Give an Ent ally +1 [attack] and +1 [defense] until the end of the round. (Limit once per round.)

name: Pippin
text: Has a [lore] icon. While Merry is in play, Pippin gets +1 [willpower]. Enemies bet –5 engagment cost when making engagement checks against you.

name: Pippin
text: If Pippin has the Ring-bearer trait, he gains a [lore] icon. While Merry is in play, Pippin gets +1 [attack] and does not exhaust to quest. Action: Ready an Ent ally. (Limit once per round.)

name: Legolas
text: Cannot participate in an attack with Gimli or attack an enemy that Gimli has defended this round. Response: At the end of the staging step, deal 1 damage to an enemy in the staging area.

name: Legolas
text: Gimli gets +1 [attack] and +1 [defense]. Response: At the end of the staging step, deal 1 damage to an enemy in the staging area or engaged with a player.

name: Gimli
text: Cannot defend an enemy that Legolas has damaged this round with his response. Response: At the end of the round, heal 1 damage from Gimli.

name: Gimli
text: Does not exhaust to defend attacks made by enemies that have been dealt damage this round by Legolas’s response. Response: At the end of the round, heal 1 damage from Gimli.

name: Two is Company
text: You may choose up to 6 starting heroes, with no more than 3 sharing a printed sphere or Trait. Your starting threat is 3 times the median of your heroes’ threat costs. You cannot control other contracts. The maximum number of allowed players is reduced by 1. Forced: After setup, flip this card over.

name: Two is Company
text: Draw 1 additional card during the resource phase. The first player reveals 1 additional encounter card during the staging step. You may optionally engage 1 additional enemy during the encounter phase. When a value refers to the number of players, increase the value by 1. Effects that target each player target you 2 times (with exceptions, see FAQ).

name: Three is Company
text: You may choose up to 9 starting heroes, with no more than 3 sharing a printed sphere or Trait. Your starting threat is 3 times the median of your heroes’ threat costs. You cannot control other contracts. The maximum number of allowed players is reduced by 2. Forced: After setup, flip this card over.

name: Three is Company
text: Draw 2 additional cards during the resource phase. The first player reveals 2 additional encounter cards during the staging step. You may optionally engage 2 additional enemies during the encounter phase. When a value refers to the number of players, increase the value by 2. Effects that target each player target you 3 times (with exceptions, see FAQ).

name: Four is Company
text: You may choose up to 12 starting heroes, with no more than 3 sharing a printed sphere or Trait. Your starting threat is 3 times the median of your heroes’ threat costs. You cannot control other contracts. The maximum number of allowed players is reduced by 3. Forced: After setup, flip this card over.

name: Four is Company
text: Draw 3 additional cards during the resource phase. The first player reveals 3 additional encounter cards during the staging step. You may optionally engage 3 additional enemies during the encounter phase. When a value refers to the number of players, increase the value by 3. Effects that target each player target you 4 times (with exceptions, see FAQ).

name: The One Ring
text: Cannot be included in a deck. Attached hero gains the Ring-bearer trait. If The One Ring leaves play, the players lose the game. When choosing a scenario to play, if all your starting heroes have the Walker trait, you may attach The One Ring from your collection to hero you control for all players to ignore the rule preventing the use of [fellowship] cards outside The Lord of the Rings saga. Response: At the end of round 3 or more, flip this card over.

name: The One Ring
text: Attached hero gains the Ring-bearer trait. If The One Ring leaves play, the players lose the game. When Revealed: Flip each [fellowship] hero over.
